name: circular_dependency
description: When two or more modules depend on each other, creating a cycle that makes the system harder to understand, test, and maintain.
symptoms: Import errors or circular import warnings
Changes in one module unexpectedly affect others

bad_example.description: A and B directly depend on each other

refactoring_strategies.name: Dependency Inversion
steps: Create interfaces for the crossing dependencies
Have both modules depend on the interface

refactoring_strategies.name: Move Shared Code
refactoring_strategies.description: Extract shared functionality to new module
steps: Create a third module with shared code
Have both modules import from the new module

refactoring_strategies.name: Merge Modules
refactoring_strategies.description: If modules are tightly coupled, they may belong together

refactoring_strategies.name: Lazy Import
refactoring_strategies.description: Import at use time instead of module load
